name: Aten's Chamber
description:
You are standing in a comfortable chamber.  Sunlight streams in the the open
windows, and a warm spring breeze ruffles your hair.  Thick furs cover the
stone walls and floor.  A stained oak table dominates the center of the room,
and couches line the walls.  You look out the window and are vaguely surprised
that you can't see the ground.
